## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and next steps for Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic and keyword rankings are improving, with new highs being reached weekly](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Need to develop nurture sequences and implement better lead tracking mechanisms in Q1](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Plans to integrate conversion panels and checklists into blog posts for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Liz (contractor) will review event registration content for consistency with product positioning](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Seeing consistent growth in organic traffic and keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Block-level performance shows even better results](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Daily clicks reaching 2,000; some clients achieve up to 10,000 daily clicks](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Focus on event registration and related keywords as per previous discussion with Stacey](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Lead Generation and Tracking

  - [Suggestion to include conversion panels and checklists in articles (0.5-2% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Considering implementation of RB2B or similar tools for visitor identification (5-20% identification rate)](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Need to track not just clicks and impressions, but lead quality and ICP alignment](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Discussion of potential tools like 6sense, RollWorks for enhanced tracking (planned for Q1)](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

### Content Review and Optimization

  - [Liz (contractor) to review event registration content for product alignment](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Will add Liz to Airtable for commenting and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Suggestion to prioritize review of best-performing blog articles that align with key topics](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Brand-Specific Content

  - [Discussed possibility of creating more brand-specific, comparison-style content](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Swoogo team indicates this would likely be handled internally, not outsourced](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### Visual Content Enhancement

  - [Suggestion to incorporate design elements and custom graphics into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Will to provide Figma file with brand guidelines and past charts/graphs](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Example shared of Reddit's approach using a Google Drive folder with named images](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Call-to-Action Implementation

  - [Current blog template lacks robust CTA mechanisms](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Discussed adding offers, ebooks, or data reports as lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Will and Rebecca to explore options for standardizing CTAs across blog post templates in 2024](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Potential use of OptinMonster for WordPress implementation](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rebecca to onboard Liz for content review and add her to Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Will to provide design assets (Figma file or Google Drive) for blog post enhancement](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Explore implementation of conversion panels and checklists in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Plan for developing nurture sequences in Q1](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Investigate tools for better lead tracking and identification (RB2B, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Will and Rebecca to discuss CTA implementation strategies for 2024](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Jimmy to send a more detailed content update](https://fathom.video/share/xmzaJXw_WFj754TTVxzhDxQx5rhFHsFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
